headline: New coalition puts children's rights at centre of AI development
meta_description: An international coalition launched in Geneva prioritizes children's safety and rights as artificial intelligence transforms education and childhood.
summary_short: A new global coalition is working to ensure children's welfare isn't overlooked as AI reshapes learning, play, and growing up.
body:
As artificial intelligence becomes woven into how children learn and play, a new international coalition launched in Geneva is making sure their rights and safety stay at the forefront of this technological shift. Rather than letting child welfare become an afterthought, this effort brings together voices committed to protecting young people during the AI age.

The coalition's focus reflects a growing recognition that technology development must account for its real impact on children's lives—from education to play to healthy development. By placing children's needs at the centre, this partnership aims to shape how AI grows alongside a new generation.
